RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MABEL TENG'S Motion For Mandatory Dismissal Or, In The Alernative, Discretionary Dismissal Of Plaintiff's Complaint, And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. There are no grounds for a mandatory or discretionary dismissal because this action was stayed from October 11, 2007 (order granting stay) to February 4, 2013 (remittitur issued). The stay tolled the running of the statutory time limitations. See CCP 583.240(b). The arbitration proceedings were resolved only after issuance of the remittitur. Federal Ins. Co. v. Sup. Crt. (1998) 60 Cal.App.4th 1370, 1374-1375. The motion to quash is denied as moot. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
